/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libxrf2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libxrf2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/xrf2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/xrf2_msgs/msg/detail/ros2_xeno__description.c.o CMakeFiles/xrf2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/xrf2_msgs/msg/detail/ros2_xeno__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/xrf2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/xrf2_msgs/msg/detail/ros2_xeno__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/xrf2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/xrf2_msgs/msg/detail/xeno2_ros__description.c.o CMakeFiles/xrf2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/xrf2_msgs/msg/detail/xeno2_ros__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/xrf2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/xrf2_msgs/msg/detail/xeno2_ros__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
